## What changed

<!-- Describe the change in one or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content update (text, projects, people)
- [ ] Design / layout
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Pages render correctly locally (open the HTML files or `npx serve .`)
- [ ] New images have `width`/`height`, `alt` text, and a `.webp` counterpart
- [ ] `sitemap.xml` updated if pages were added/removed
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data committed
